## Validation

- [ ] `uv run ruff format --check .` and `uv run ruff check .` pass
- [ ] `uv run pytest` passes offline (synthetic data)
- [ ] New behavior is covered by tests (hand-calculated cases for accounting/timing)
- [ ] No credentials, private data, or absolute private paths in the diff
